summary: Iteration 4 party ledger feature tested end-to-end. Backend: 26/26 tests pass (10 new ledger + 16 regression). Frontend: parties -> ledger navigation, add/delete ledger entry, quick-add prefill, running balance, print button, back-nav all work. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~790 lines — approaching split threshold; consider modularizing into routers (firms, trips, ledger) in next iteration.
Balance sign coloring in PartyLedger.jsx row: uses inline conditional; both true branches map to #C04848 and both fallbacks to #1A1A1A — logic works but could be simplified.
Party ledger endpoint does not paginate; fine for now but 5000-doc cap on trips + party_payments should be raised or paginated for scale.
seed_data_creation: Test data created via UI (UITEST_CONSIGNOR_*) — left in DB, harmless. Backend tests self-clean firm/party/trip/payment fixtures via teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ledger endpoint /api/parties/{id}/ledger and /api/party-payments CRUD verified. Consignor scenario (debit=80000, credit=40000, balance=40000) and Transporter scenario (debit=20000, credit=50000, balance=-30000) both pass. Firm filter works. Frontend PartyLedger page fully wired with data-testids.
